quickIssue.title: Quick Tool Issue
quickIssue.content: Here you can quickly issue a tool to an employee by scanning a QR code or entering the name/code manually.

quickReturn.title: Quick Tool Return
quickReturn.content: Here you can quickly accept a tool return from an employee by scanning a code or selecting from the list.

search.title: Search
search.content: Type a phrase or use Ctrl+K shortcut to instantly search system resources, tools, and employees.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.content: The sidebar provides quick access to all system modules: Tools, Employees, Reports, BHP, and Settings.

help.title: Help Center
help.content: Click the question mark icon to open the help panel with guides and FAQs.
